data.title: Chainalysis will introduce 'blockchain intelligence' agents to platform, with rollout starting this summer for investigations.
data.description: The analytics platform announced plans to gradually release the agents during the summer for utilization in investigations and compliance purposes.

data.title: BTC rose to $68K on optimism of US-Israel-Iran conflict resolution, but bearish sentiment from futures traders persists.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to $68,000 amidst positive market reactions to the potential resolution of the conflict between the US and Israel-Iran. However, data indicates that futures traders remain skeptical about the rally.

data.title: Never Miss a Notification from Illinois American Water
data.description: Please update your contact details today to stay informed about emergency and general service alerts in BELLEVILLE, Illinois. Illinois American Water is advising customers to log in to their MyWater online portal and ensure their information is up to date. This will help in receiving important notifications promptly.

data.title: Kulani Kinis x Oceanus: At The After Party
data.description: Sydney, March 31, 2026 - Kulani Kinis and Oceanus recently announced their collaboration on a limited capsule collection named At The After Party. The two female-founded brands, originating from Australia and Britain, have joined forces with a common design objective after both establishing a strong presence in the fashion industry. This partnership brings together their unique aesthetics and expertise to craft a special collection that resonates with their global audience.

data.title: Kirby Corporation Announces Date for 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Webcast
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Kirby Corporation (NYSE: KEX) is scheduled to release its first quarter results for 2026 at 6:00 a.m. CDT on April 30, 2026. Following the announcement, an earnings conference call webcast is set to take place at 7:30 a.m. CDT. Investors and stakeholders should mark their calendars for these important updates from Kirby.
Iran: A meteorological radar in Bushehr has been hit again in US-Israeli strikes - ISNA.

data.title: POET Technologies Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In its latest report released on March 31, 2026, POET Technologies Inc. (TSX Venture: PTK; NASDAQ: POET) disclosed its audited consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The company specializes in designing and developing Photonic Integrated Circuits (PICs), light sources, and optical modules for the AI and data center sectors. All financial data is presented in United States dollars (USD) and can be accessed on SEDAR+.

data.title: Micron Announces the Pricing of the Cash Tender Offers for Any and All of Certain Outstanding Senior Notes
data.description: Micron Technology, Inc. revealed the Reference Yield and Notes Consideration for cash tender offers on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: MU, disclosed details of the offers for various note series. The tender offers, collectively known as the "Tender Offers," include different series of notes, with specific terms outlined in the table provided by the company. This announcement signifies an important financial move by Micron in its ongoing operations.

data.title: Titanium Announces Closing of Plan of Arrangement
data.description: In Bolton, Ontario, on March 31, 2026, Titanium Transportation Group Inc. (TSX: TTNM, OTCQX: TTNMF), a leading provider of transportation and logistics services across North America, has successfully finalized its plan of arrangement under the Canada Business Corporations Act.

data.title: Nasdaq Props The Door For SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs
data.description: Nasdaq, vying for SpaceX's listing, has streamlined the process for Elon Musk's company and other large IPOs to join the Nasdaq 100 index swiftly. This move opens up opportunities for rapid entry into the index, benefiting mega IPOs like SpaceX.

data.title: SurgePays to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: BARTLETT, Tennessee - March 31, 2026 - SurgePays, Inc. (NASDAQ: SURG), a leading wireless and fintech point of sale firm catering to subprime and underserved consumers with critical mobile and financial services, revealed its upcoming conference call to discuss financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The call is scheduled for Tuesday, April 14, 2026.

data.title: Eastman Chemical Stock Scores Relative Strength Rating Upgrade
data.description: Eastman Chemical has demonstrated increasing price strength, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade comes as the company's stock shows strong performance compared to its peers. The upgrade reflects Eastman Chemical's improved performance metrics, indicating a positive momentum for the company. This boost in rating signifies growing investor interest in Eastman Chemical, as it continues to outperform in the market.

data.title: Riverview Bancorp Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.02 Per Share
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Vancouver, Riverview Bancorp, Inc. disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share on March 26, 2026, consistent with the previous quarter. The approved dividend will be disbursed on April 24, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 13, 2026. This announcement was made by Riverview Bancorp, Inc. on Nasdaq GSM under the ticker symbol RVSB.

data.title: SEALSQ Stock Climbs After Earnings: Here's Why
data.description: SEALSQ Corp. (NASDAQ: LAES) saw an increase in its shares during Tuesday's after-hours trading session following the release of its fiscal-year earnings report. This report revealed that SEALSQ reported a quarterly loss of 24 cents per share, which was below the analyst consensus of a 5-cent loss. The company's quarterly revenue was $18.25 million, surpassing the Street estimate of $12.9 million by 41.49% and marking a 66.21% rise from the previous quarter's $10.98 million. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story on SEALSQ's fiscal year results. Watch LAES stock for further price movement updates.

data.title: Scheme of Arrangement becomes Effective and takeover offer declared unconditional
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited ("CoinShares") (Nasdaq Stockholm: CS; US OTCQX: CNSRF) revealed a planned merger with Vine Hill Capital Investment Corp (Nasdaq: VCIC) and Odysseus Holdings Limited. Vine Hill had previously merged with Odysseus Cayman through a SPAC Merger. The merger involves a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Article 125 of the Jersey Companies Law. Upon completion, the Transaction will move CoinShares' listing from Nasdaq Stockholm to the Nasdaq Stock Market in the United States. CoinShares issued a scheme circular on February 18, 2026, detailing the Scheme of Arrangement.

data.title: Soulpower Acquisition Corporation (NYSE:SOUL) and SWB Holdings Amend Business Combination Agreement and Announce Adjustment to Asset Contributions
data.description: The expected merger is now set to be finalized in the later part of the second quarter or third quarter of 2026. The combined company's pro forma valuation is estimated to be around $8.5 billion.

data.title: FLEXIBLE SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL DELAYS RELEASE OF FINANCIALS
data.description: Taber, Alberta-based company Flexible Solutions International, Inc. (NYSE-AMERICAN: FSI), known for developing biodegradable polymers for various uses, including oil extraction and water treatment, has recently shifted focus to the food and nutrition supplement markets. The company, which also produces environmentally friendly water and energy conservation technologies, has announced a postponement in the release of its full-year 2025 financial reports.
